CheckTitle: ECS instances should have security groups attached
Description: Ensure that ECS instances have at least one security group attached to control network traffic.
Risk: ECS instances without security groups have no network-level access control, potentially allowing unrestricted inbound or outbound traffic.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console
2. Navigate to Elastic Cloud Server
3. Select the instance
4. Click More > Manage Security Group
5. Attach an appropriate security group

Recommendation.Text: Attach at least one properly configured security group to every ECS instance.
